vbpSection.body: Vero Beach Pediatrics has cared for this community since 1987. Vero Beach Adult Medicine is the same family's answer to a real gap: high-quality, relationship-based primary care for adults in Vero Beach — without the concierge price.

servicesSection.subhead: Primary care that covers your whole health picture — not just the reason you came in today.

ctaStrip.subhead: Most insurance accepted. No membership fee. Book your first appointment online or call us directly.

principles.body: You see the same physician every visit. They know your history, your current medications, and what you discussed last time — because continuity is how good medicine works.
Annual well visits, screenings, and lab reviews are the foundation of this practice — not optional add-ons. We catch problems before they become serious.
Same-day sick visits, direct callbacks, and a panel small enough that the front desk knows your name. Attentive care — without a membership fee.

positioning.body1: Vero Beach Pediatrics spent decades caring for this community's children. Vero Beach Adult Medicine was built for those same families — now grown — along with the professionals, retirees, and working adults who make Vero Beach home.
positioning.pullQuote: A real practice. A real doctor. Every visit.
positioning.body2: We keep our patient panel intentionally small so care stays consistent. You see the same physician each visit — someone who knows your history and engages with your health over time, not just when something goes wrong.

hero.lede: Vero Beach Adult Medicine is a small-panel primary care practice built around one idea: that good medicine is proactive, not reactive. We see adult patients for the full picture — annual well visits, preventive screenings, chronic disease management, and acute care — with the same doctor, every time. Most insurance accepted. No membership fee.

trustBar: Small panel · Same physician every visit

homeServices.title: Annual Physicals & Wellness
homeServices.body: Your annual exam includes bloodwork, preventive screenings, immunization review, mental health, and a real conversation about where your health is headed.

homeServices.title: Chronic Condition Management
homeServices.body: Hypertension, diabetes, thyroid, high cholesterol — actively managed by a physician who tracks your trends and adjusts your plan as your health changes.

homeServices.title: Same-Day Sick Visits
homeServices.body: When you're sick, you get in. Direct access to the practice, same-day availability, and a doctor who already knows your history.

homeServices.title: Women's & Men's Health
homeServices.body: Annual exams, hormone health, perimenopause care, and men's wellness — addressed with the same clinical attention we bring to every visit.

homeServices.title: Preventive Screenings & Labs
homeServices.body: In-house labs and evidence-based screening protocols. We order what's appropriate for your age and risk profile — and go over results with you directly.

homeServices.title: Travel & Lifestyle Medicine
homeServices.body: Pre-travel consults, vaccines, and destination-specific guidance. Plus ongoing support for sleep, weight management, and long-term health goals.
